title: Eibon Scimitar

{{Quote|Whole planets may be laid waste and fleets of wreckage float lifelessly in the void; still-warm fragments of Death Star may tumble alongside the cold splinters of the ''Eibon Scimitar''.|[[Rivoche Tarkin]]|<ref name="DESB">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
The '''''Eibon Scimitar''''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] that served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] during the [[Xim Wars]].<ref name="Xim1" /> Its keel was laid down in the [[Barancar]] [[Barancar|shipyards]],<ref name="EGW" /> and it was destroyed during the [[First Battle of Vontor]].<ref name="Xim1" /> The ship was replaced by the ''[[Deathknell]]'', which met a similar fate at the [[Third Battle of Vontor]].<ref name="EGW" /> Its cold splinters continued to drift through space long after the battle ended.<ref name="DESB" />

Popularly portrayed as an enormous ship, images of the ''Eibon Scimitar'' later inspired the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser]]. Despite its depiction as a gargantuan vessel, military [[Historian/Legends|historians]] agreed that the ''Eibon Scimitar'' would qualify as a [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]] under the [[Anaxes War College System/Legends|Anaxes War College System]].<ref name="EGW" />
